_comment: Monsoon Surge storyline (~20s). Rainfall waves flood hundreds of low-elevation roads for visual drama; the t=8 bridge flood severs the NH66 crossing (edge-group logic floods all 3 carriageway segments), triggering the impact alert + safe-zone remap; the t=11 southern incident forces a hard fleet-assignment decision while the bridge is out; t=18 the rain eases and low roads visibly recover.
